summary.lv: Windows sistēmu administrators Balticom telekomunikāciju uzņēmumā, uzturot Windows Server infrastruktūru, Active Directory, virtualizāciju (Hyper-V/Proxmox) un monitoringa sistēmas.
summary.en: Windows System Administrator at Balticom, maintaining Windows Server 2019–2025 infrastructure, Active Directory, Hyper-V/Proxmox virtualization and Zabbix monitoring for Latvia's leading telecom provider.
